The Gallery

Recent sets, straight off the table

A mix of everyday inspo and full custom requests — every shape, finish and detail made to order.

What's on the Menu

Services

Built around Gel X, but the menu is always growing — a few beginner favourites are on their way.

Gel X Extensions

Lightweight, damage-free extensions built to your ideal shape and length — the base for almost every set.

Custom Nail Design

Bring a reference or just describe the vision — hand-painted, one-of-one, made for your event or everyday.

Nail Art & Inspo

Florals, chrome, 3D charms, graphic linework — pick from the gallery or let it be a surprise.

Full Sets

Structured, salon-finished sets in your choice of shape, length and gloss or matte finish.

Coming Soon

Classic Manicure

A simple shape, cuticle care and polish — quick, clean, and low maintenance.

Coming Soon

Nail Care & Repair

Strengthening treatments and repair for natural nails that need a little rescue.

Coming Soon

Mini Mani (Kids)

A gentle, playful mini manicure for little hands — polish only, no extensions.

Coming Soon

Press-On Sets

Custom-fit press-ons for a night out or a trial run before your full set.

The Hands Behind It

Hi, I'm the one behind the table.

I started doing nails for friends on my kitchen table, and it turned into something I think about constantly — shapes, finishes, the tiny details nobody else would notice but me.

Every set is booked one at a time, so it gets my full attention, start to finish.
